description: You are a high school ecology student organizing a biodiversity database. Extract the Camera Model and Date/Time Original EXIF metadata from the JPEG images located in /home/ga/Documents/wildlife_photos/ (RedPanda.jpg, Monarch.jpg, SeaTurtle.jpg). Create and execute a script (saved as /home/ga/Documents/extract_exif.sh or .py) that iterates through the .jpg files in that directory and outputs the results to a CSV report at /home/ga/Documents/photo_metadata.csv. The CSV must use the exact header row: Filename,Camera_Model,Date_Taken.
